tagline: The ultimate open-source gaming time tracker.

features.title: Every stat you can think of
features.description: Daily, monthly & annual playtimes, Session lengths, Completion status, Day/Night playtime ratio, Cost per hour and more.

features.title: Fast & Responsive
features.description: Blazing fast in-browser UI. Sub 5 sec game detection, even in libraries with 100s of games.

features.title: Track PC & Emulated games
features.description: Supports Retroarch and standalone emulators. Auto tracks new roms when you play.

features.title: Offline & Private
features.description: No cloud, no accounts. Your data lives in local SQLite database.

features.title: Extremely Lightweight
features.description: Leaves resources to games. Less than 50 MB RAM and almost nil CPU usage.

features.title: Multi PC Support
features.description: Track games across all your gaming PCs in a single Database.

slides.title: Fast Browser UI
slides.description: All your games at a glance with cover art, status icons, playtime, session count, last played date and gaming PC used.

slides.title: Sessions History
slides.description: Have a record of every single session you played for every game.

slides.title: Day & Night gaming
slides.description: Record gaming time based on local timezone. Are you a night owl or morning lark?.

slides.title: Gaming Year in Review
slides.description: Your local year in review available any time, stop waiting for Steam to publish theirs.

slides.title: Life Time Summary
slides.description: One view to rule them all. See everything at a glance, including cost analysis of your gaming PCs.

slides.title: Daily Playtime Every Month
slides.description: Calendar view with daily play time bar chart, with marked weekends.

slides.title: Games By Platform
slides.description: See how many games you have played on different consoles.

slides.title: Most Played Games
slides.description: Check your top 10, 20, 30... most played games anytime.

slides.title: PC vs Emulation
slides.description: Ratio of time you spend playing PC games vs Emulated games.

slides.title: Annual Playtime Breakdown By Months
slides.description: Vacations vs Work, which months were you most active in your hobby.

slides.title: Search
slides.description: Instant search across all columns with fuzzy matching.

slides.title: Sort
slides.description: Sort by any column, check highest played, highest sessions, recently played and more.

slides.title: Detailed Help Manual
slides.description: Answers to most confusions and questions available at click of button.
